summary: The Fury Tribe, a long-time rival of Anthromorph, has turned against them and is invading their land. The leader of Anthromorph, the Blood Wolf King, rallies his people to fight back and protect their honor and glory. Meanwhile, a young hero named Regis Mado seems torn between his duty to protect his city and his desire to befriend the Fury Tribe.
key_moments: The Blood Wolf King rallies his people
